text: HCLTECH presents a compelling buy, trading 21.11% below its 52-week high and maintaining a significant value gap. Bullish momentum is building, with the MACD turning positive 12 days ago and an RSI of 43.86 indicating room for upside, a conviction shared by HDFC Flexi Cap.

  Distance below 52-week high: 21.11%

- Use ONLY the values above. Do not invent prices, percentages, or company facts.
- Write 2-3 sentences total. Plain English. No jargon-heavy phrasing.
- Explain WHY the technical signals matter for an entry decision.
